# Control Paper Fixture

This fixture is an anonymized control case derived from a real paper sequence that was created outside GPD. It preserves the workflow failure pattern without carrying real person names, employer names, job titles, company names, or local source paths.

The fixture represents a strategy paper for a regulated financial-services organization. The draft has a credible idea and a useful operating model, but it is not yet a GPD-quality paper because it lacks source mapping, counterargument handling, audience conflict management, and explicit voice/profile checks.

Use this fixture to test whether GPD catches failures on a paper it was not tuned against.
